heading: Existing provisions of law
label: 522 Existing provisions of law
text: The first sentence of , and , shall be inapplicable with respect to any bridge to which the provisions of this subchapter are applicable.section 494 of this titlesection 502 of this title
notes: Amendments2022—, struck out “, except to the extent provided in this section” before period at end.Pub. L. 117–263, § 11805(c), reinstated , as it appeared before repeal by , and redesignated it as the sole text of section 12.Pub. L. 117–263, § 11805(a)section 12(a) of the act of June 21, 1940Pub.
